data.title: Notification of executives and related parties’ transactions with Nilfisk shares
data.description: In compliance with the EU Market Abuse Regulation Article 19 number 596/2014, Nilfisk has been informed by executives and/or their related parties of transactions involving shares of Nilfisk.

data.title: Netflix Stock Rises Ahead Of Video Streamer's First-Quarter Report
data.description: On Tuesday, the stock of Netflix increased in anticipation of its first-quarter earnings report, which is scheduled to be released later this week. The popular subscription streaming video service is expected to announce strong financial results. The rise in Netflix's stock price reflects positive investor sentiment ahead of the report.

data.title: Why CarMax Stock Is Sinking Despite Earnings Beat
data.description: Late last year, the retailer was removed from the S&P 500 index. Despite beating earnings expectations, CarMax stock is currently dropping.

data.title: Would A United, American Airlines Merger Shake Up The Airline Industry?
data.description: It has been reported that United Airlines has put forward a proposal for a merger with American Airlines, in discussions that also involve President Trump. Such a merger would reduce the number of major carriers in the industry from three to two. Following this news, there was a notable increase in airline stocks. The possibility of a merger between United and American Airlines has raised questions about the potential impact on the airline industry as a whole.

data.title: UBS Upgrades Tesla Stock, But Sees No 'Meaningful Scaling' Of Robotaxis
data.description: On Tuesday, UBS raised Tesla's rating to neutral. However, they are not anticipating significant growth in robotaxi operations. Despite this, Tesla's stock saw an increase, continuing a series of successful days. The upgrade was highlighted in a report by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Analyst Calls This Automaker A Buy. The Stock Just Topped A Key Level.
data.description: UBS analysts have identified an automaker that they believe is on track to achieve earnings exceeding $2 per share by 2027. This assessment positions the company on a promising trajectory for future growth. The analysis has led an analyst to recommend investing in this automaker, viewing it as a lucrative opportunity. Moreover, the stock of this automaker has recently surpassed a significant milestone, indicating a positive trend in its performance. Investors are advised to consider this automaker as a potential buy, given its optimistic earnings prospects and recent stock performance.

data.title: Kevin Warsh, Fed Chair nominee, reveals wealth exceeding $100 million. Invests in Polymarket, SpaceX, and tech startups, including male contraceptive project.
data.description: Kevin Warsh, a former Wall Street banker with a net worth exceeding $100 million, has expanded his investment portfolio to include multiple tech startups. Among his investments is a project focused on developing a "reversible male contraceptive solution."

data.title: Citi Initiates Infleqtion At Buy On Nvidia Pact. Quantum Computing Stocks Rally.
data.description: A notable financial institution, Citi, began coverage of quantum technology company Infleqtion with a recommendation to buy. This move led to a surge in the value of quantum computing stocks. The surge followed Citi's initiation of Infleqtion as a 'buy,' partially due to its partnership with Nvidia. This development was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: West-MEC Celebrated Opening of Nation's First K-12 CTE Semiconductor Cleanroom
data.description: On April 13, 2026, in Glendale, Arizona, the Western Maricopa Education Center (West-MEC) commemorated the opening of its Advanced Manufacturing Cleanroom. This facility is distinguished as the first K-12 Career and Technical Education (CTE) semiconductor cleanroom in the United States. The event marked a significant achievement in education and industry integration, showcasing a cleanroom of notable size for this demographic.

data.title: Trucordia Acquires the assets of JJL&W Insurance Consulting, Expanding Employee Benefits Footprint in Louisiana
data.description: On April 14, 2026, in Lindon, Utah, Trucordia, a leading U.S. insurance brokerage, unveiled its acquisition of JJL&W Insurance Consulting’s assets. This Baton Rouge, Louisiana-based brokerage specialized in employee benefits and was established in 2020 by founders Jeff Joffrion and Troy Jones. Trucordia, ranking among the top 20 insurance brokerages in the U.S., made strategic moves to expand its portfolio by acquiring JJL&W Insurance Consulting's assets.

data.title: Mercurius Media Capital Invests in Emission Free Generators to Accelerate Clean Portable Power in the U.S.
data.description: In Redwood City, California, Mercurius Media Capital (MMC) revealed their investment in clean energy company Emission Free Generators (EFG), marking MMC’s initial foray into the sustainability sector. This strategic media capital injection will bolster EFG’s U.S. expansion efforts and promote its hydrogen-on-demand portable power technology. It comes at a crucial time as California plans to prohibit the sale and acquisition of new fossil fuel-powered generators. This significant investment signals MMC’s commitment to supporting environmentally-friendly initiatives and signifies a new chapter in their investment portfolio.

data.title: Associated Industries of Massachusetts Honors Avangrid with 2026 Vision Award
data.description: Boston-based Avangrid has been acknowledged for its exceptional efforts in promoting economic opportunity in Massachusetts. The recognition highlights the company's significant impact on the state's economy.

data.title: Spirit Airlines Named WalletHub's 2026 Best Airline for Second Consecutive Year
data.description: DANIA BEACH, Florida - On April 14, 2026, Spirit Airlines has once again secured the top position as the Best Airline Overall in WalletHub's 'Best Airlines' (2026) report. The carrier, known for its value-focused approach, also came in first for affordability and reliability. This marks the second consecutive year that Spirit Airlines has claimed the top spot in the rankings.

data.title: 2026: New York City's 1000 Prevost motorcoaches
data.description: In New York City, on April 14, 2026, Prevost, a key player in the Volvo Group and a top motorcoach producer in North America, revealed a significant milestone. The New York City Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA) is set to receive its 1000th Prevost coach in 2026. This delivery marks a notable achievement for the company, showcasing a strong partnership with MTA and highlighting their prominent position in the industry.

data.title: The Nader Sisters Join First-Ever Study on Women's Reproductive, Sleep, and Circadian Health in Extreme Polar Environments
data.description: A groundbreaking expedition to Svalbard is being conducted in collaboration with NYU Langone Health and the University of Arizona, along with the Space Prize Foundation. The Nader Sisters and the Foundation have proudly unveiled their involvement in this science-driven project. The expedition, set to take place on April 14, 2026, aims to advance research and exploration efforts.

data.title: AngloGold Ashanti Holdings plc Announces Pricing of Capped Cash Tender Offers for Part of Its 3.375% Notes Due 2028, 3.750% Notes Due 2030 and 6.500% Notes Due 2040
data.description: AngloGold Ashanti Holdings plc has disclosed the pricing details of their capped cash tender offers. The company has made this announcement from London, Denver, and Johannesburg.
The meeting between the Israeli and Lebanese ambassadors hosted by Secretary of State Rubio has ended after more than two hours - Axios.

data.title: Real Estate Expert Marilyn Myers of Rancho Santa Fe Discusses Marketing and Positioning Luxury Homes for HelloNation
data.description: In Rancho Santa Fe, California on April 14, 2026, a recent article by HelloNation discussed the key factors for successful luxury home marketing in today's real estate market. Simply listing a property on the MLS is not enough to attract buyers in Rancho Santa Fe's affluent market. The article emphasizes the importance of a carefully curated marketing strategy to stand out in the competitive luxury real estate sector.

data.title: Notification of major shareholding
data.description: Under Section 30 of the Danish Capital Markets Act, there has been a change in the holdings of Nilfisk Holding A/S. Ferd AS has notified Nilfisk Holding A/S that starting from April 13, 2026, it has reduced its overall ownership of shares and financial instruments related to shares or rights over shares in Nilfisk.
